title: Nepfaivy Floppy Fish Cat Toy - Cat Toys for Indoor Cats, 11" Interactive Catnip Toys for Cats, Realistic Plush Simulation Moving Fish Cat Toy, Washable, Perfect for Kittens to Bite, Chew and Kick
features: 🐟 CAT TOYS FOR INDOOR CATS: Built-in touch sensor. Turn on the fish cat toy switch, when your cat slaps it, it will automatically swing and make a sound, which will attract your cat to bite and kick. If your cat stops touching the fish toy, it will stop swinging to save electricity effectively.

🐟INTERACTIVE CAT TOYS: This cute moving cat fish toy uses 3D printing technology and simulation design, your cat will hunt this realistic interactive cat toy. The cat toy is made of short plush, it won't hurt the paw of your cat. You can enjoy the fun of watching cat's motion.

🐟 CATNIP TOYS FOR CATS: The catnip toys comes with a small bag of catnip, which is 100% organically-grown catnip, you can put it inside the cat toy or take it out. This catnip cat toy has a strong aromatic fragrance that can stimulate your cat to play.

🐟 USB RECHARGEABLE: You only need to open the zip and plug in the USB cable to charge the interactive cat toy for indoor cats. The LED light off means full charge. The motor of the catnip cat toy is detachable. Please take out the catnip and motor from the fish belly before cleaning the cat toy.

🐟 SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: The cat toys for indoor cats adult comes with a small instruction card, but if you have other questions with our interactive cat toys, you can still contact us by email, and we will provide you with a satisfactory solution.
description: Product Description NEPFAIVY has been committed to the development of toys for dogs and cats. It is our goal to provide high-quality and interesting toys for dogs and cats. Our floppy fish cat toys for indoor cats can make your cats have a great time and improve their intelligence. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked. Video Player is loading. Instruction for use: 1. Put the motor into the fish belly, turn on the motor switch, and pat the fish belly. If the floppy fish cat toy does not work properly, please charge it and try again. 2. The fish cat toy will wave its tail when it is working normally. If you or your cat stop touching it, it will stop after 20 seconds until it is touched again. 3. The charger does not exceed 5V, mobile phone charger or USB is an ideal choice; the red LED light is on when charging, goes out when fully charged; the charging time does not exceed 70 minutes. 4. Before cleaning the fish cat toy, please take out the motor from the fish belly. Dancing toy fish Automatic Induction Fish Toy Turn on the motor switch and slap the fish belly, the fish cat toy will start to pounce, which is enough to attract your cat to jump up to catch the fish cat toy and hug it, and then bite and chew it like a prey. Rechargeable fish toy Chargeable By USB This fish toy is easy to charge. Through USB charging, the battery can be fully charged quickly and lasts a long time. There is a red led on when charging, the red led is off when fully charged. (The light doesn’t turn green when it's done charging) Soft fish toy Plush and Cotton Material This fish cat toy is made of high-quality plush fabric, filled with pp cotton, it's safe and soft, and will not harm the cat's teeth and paws. Your cat can hug and use it as a pillow when the motor was turned off. Catnip Fish Toy Catnip will make your cats excited and help relieve stress and increase appetite. You can put it in the fish belly to attract your cats to play. Washable Fish Cat Toy The fish cat toy uses a zipper design instead of velcro. Removable and at the same time better protects the motor and the catnip bag from falling out. Realistic Floppy Fish Cat Toy 3D simulation pattern and the vivid shape design make this floppy fish cat toy look like a real fish. Keep your cat from getting bored. Package Includes 1*Electric moving fish cat toy; 1*USB cable; 1*Catnip pack; 1*Instructions card. Purchasing Notice： 1. When the dancing fish cat toy swings on the floor, the sound of the motor may be slightly louder. You can put it on the carpet to reduce the sound. 2. Different cats have different preferences. Not all cats will like this floppy fish cat toy, especially those who like quiet or don't like exercise. (If you mind the sound and worry that the cat does not like this fish toy, please consider carefully before buying.)
